text.t: [Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: S

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: Since these are kinda consumables and you can only get a limited number per playthrough, does it make sense perhaps to list all the Twigs you can get individually just like is done for Key Items? Reply: I guess that makes sense. That's also a good idea. I will create a separate section for those on this sheet.
